# Security Policy

If you find a problem that affects the safety of users or their data, please
report it privately rather than opening a public issue.

- Email: **suslovhlib@gmail.com**
- Or use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting on this repository.

We'll acknowledge your report and follow up on a fix. Thanks for helping keep the
project and its users safe.

For the deeper technical model of how access control works, see
[`docs/SECURITY.md`](../docs/SECURITY.md).
